subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou through Whose fire of love the world hath been set ablaze, and before Whose Most Great Name the nations have bowed down! I beseech Thee by the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بنار حبک اشتعل العالم و لاسمک الاعظم خضع الامم اسئلک بالکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
